title: Senior Financial Analyst - South Indian Bank - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - South Indian Bank - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with South Indian Bank! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Mysuru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About South Indian Bank:
South Indian Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with South Indian Bank!
